title: ONYX Sharper Blades
body:
### **Made On 1.21.11 But Should Work On Every Version.**

**Replaces The Default Minecraft Sword Textures With Sharper / More Agressive Ones**, It's A Small Change But It _Does_ Make A Difference.


Only Changes The Sword Textures, So **It's Compatible With All Your Other Resource Packs**.




YT - https://www.youtube.com/@ascent_mc

TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@ascent.mc

Store - https://ascentmc.gumroad.com/
